hero_subtitle: SFTY helps digital asset businesses maintain secure, role-based retention of case records and investigation history supporting audit readiness and institutional compliance requirements.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case data retention lacks clear controls
problem_description: Without defined retention policies, case and investigation records become difficult to govern and audit reliably. Compliance teams face challenges supporting data integrity, secure access, and long-term availability for regulatory and due diligence reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes case history, investigation records, access permissions and evidence integrity into a unified retention workflow that supports traceability, audit readiness and secure compliance data management for VASPs.
workflow_title: From case creation to evidence retention
workflow_description: SFTY structures case workflows by capturing review actions and preserving investigation records with controlled retention and role-based access governance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond scattered evidence. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides regulated businesses a unified control layer that preserves case history, supports role-based access, and supports evidence integrity for audit and regulatory readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides regulated VASPs with controlled case data retention, evidence preservation, bank due diligence support and secure deployment in enterprise compliance environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case history supports audit-ready compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how retention policies preserve evidence integrity over time

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence, and reports for regulated digital asset businesses and institutional compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage case data retention?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies configurable retention rules to case history, investigation records and evidence, supporting governance by maintaining secure, role-based access and audit logs throughout the data lifecycle.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and evidential materials with audit logs and controlled access, enabling defensible review and supporting bank due diligence and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance systems?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is designed to integrate seamlessly above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers within your current compliance technology stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and other providers into one operational workflow and does not replace these underlying systems.
final_title: Review case data retention with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY supports secure, role-based case retention that preserves audit-ready evidence and strengthens institutional compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
